tEn: Semi-Supervised Classification with Graph Convolutional Networks
tZh: 基于图卷积网络的半监督分类
sEn: A scalable semi-supervised learning approach using graph convolutional networks outperforms related methods on citation networks and knowledge graphs.
sZh: 一种基于图卷积网络的可扩展半监督学习方法，在引文网络和知识图谱上显著优于相关方法。
absEn: We present a scalable approach for semi-supervised learning on graph-structured data that is based on an efficient variant of convolutional neural networks which operate directly on graphs. We motivate the choice of our convolutional architecture via a localized first-order approximation of spectral graph convolutions. Our model scales linearly in the number of graph edges and learns hidden layer representations that encode both local graph structure and features of nodes. In a number of experiments on citation networks and on a knowledge graph dataset we demonstrate that our approach outperforms related methods by a significant margin.
absZh: 我们提出了一种可扩展的半监督学习方法，用于处理图结构数据，该方法基于一种直接在图上操作的高效卷积神经网络变体。我们通过谱图卷积的局部一阶近似来论证卷积架构的选择。我们的模型在图边数上呈线性扩展，并学习编码局部图结构和节点特征的隐藏层表示。在引文网络和知识图谱数据集上的多项实验表明，我们的方法显著优于相关方法。

contrib.en: Introduces a scalable Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) for semi-supervised learning on graphs.
contrib.zh: 提出一种可扩展的图卷积网络（GCN），用于图上的半监督学习。

contrib.en: Motivates the GCN architecture via a localized first-order approximation of spectral graph convolutions.
contrib.zh: 通过谱图卷积的局部一阶近似来论证GCN架构的合理性。

contrib.en: Achieves linear scaling in the number of graph edges and encodes both local structure and node features.
contrib.zh: 实现与图边数成线性缩放，并编码局部结构和节点特征。

contrib.en: Outperforms related methods on citation networks and knowledge graph datasets.
contrib.zh: 在引文网络和知识图谱数据集上优于相关方法。

contrib.en: Proposes a renormalization trick to improve numerical stability and performance.
contrib.zh: 提出重归一化技巧以提高数值稳定性和性能。

contrib.en: Demonstrates efficiency in wall-clock time compared to state-of-the-art methods.
contrib.zh: 在运行时间上比现有最优方法更高效。

limits.en: Full-batch gradient descent leads to memory requirements linear in dataset size.
limits.zh: 全批量梯度下降导致内存需求与数据集大小成线性关系。

limits.en: Does not naturally support edge features or directed graphs.
limits.zh: 不天然支持边特征或有向图。

limits.en: Assumes locality and equal importance of self-connections vs. neighbor edges.
limits.zh: 假设局部性和自连接与邻居边的重要性相等。

limits.en: Mini-batch SGD requires careful handling of K-order neighborhoods for exact inference.
limits.zh: 小批量SGD需要谨慎处理K阶邻域以实现精确推理。

limits.en: Limited to undirected graphs; directed edges require bipartite graph transformation.
limits.zh: 仅限于无向图；有向边需要二部图转换。

items.en: We present a scalable approach for semi-supervised learning on graph-structured data that is based on an efficient variant of convolutional neural networks which operate directly on graphs. We motivate the choice of our convolutional architecture via a localized first-order approximation of spectral graph convolutions. Our model scales linearly in the number of graph edges and learns hidden layer representations that encode both local graph structure and features of nodes. In a number of experiments on citation networks and on a knowledge graph dataset we demonstrate that our approach outperforms related methods by a significant margin.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种可扩展的图结构数据半监督学习方法，该方法基于一种直接在图上操作的高效卷积神经网络变体。我们通过谱图卷积的局部一阶近似来论证卷积架构的选择。我们的模型在图边数上呈线性缩放，并学习编码局部图结构和节点特征的隐藏层表示。在引文网络和知识图谱数据集上的多项实验表明，我们的方法显著优于相关方法。

items.en: We consider the problem of classifying nodes (such as documents) in a graph (such as a citation network), where labels are only available for a small subset of nodes. This problem can be framed as graph-based semi-supervised learning, where label information is smoothed over the graph via some form of explicit graph-based regularization (Zhu et al., 2003; Zhou et al., 2004; Belkin et al., 2006; Weston et al., 2012), e.g. by using a graph Laplacian regularization term in the loss function:
items.zh: 我们考虑对图（如引文网络）中的节点（如文档）进行分类的问题，其中标签仅对一小部分节点可用。这个问题可以归结为基于图的半监督学习，其中标签信息通过某种显式的基于图的正则化在图上平滑（Zhu等人，2003；Zhou等人，2004；Belkin等人，2006；Weston等人，2012），例如在损失函数中使用图拉普拉斯正则化项：

items.en: Here, ℒ0subscriptℒ0\mathcal{L}_{0} denotes the supervised loss w.r.t. the labeled part of the graph, f​(⋅)𝑓⋅f(\cdot) can be a neural network-like differentiable function, λ𝜆\lambda is a weighing factor and X𝑋X is a matrix of node feature vectors Xisubscript𝑋𝑖X_{i}. Δ=D−AΔ𝐷𝐴\Delta=D-A denotes the unnormalized graph Laplacian of an undirected graph 𝒢=(𝒱,ℰ)𝒢𝒱ℰ\mathcal{G}=(\mathcal{V},\mathcal{E}) with N𝑁N nodes vi∈𝒱subscript𝑣𝑖𝒱v_{i}\in\mathcal{V}, edges (vi,vj)∈ℰsubscript𝑣𝑖subscript𝑣𝑗ℰ(v_{i},v_{j})\in\mathcal{E}, an adjacency matrix A∈ℝN×N𝐴superscriptℝ𝑁𝑁A\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times N} (binary or weighted) and a degree matrix Di​i=∑jAi​jsubscript𝐷𝑖𝑖subscript𝑗subscript𝐴𝑖𝑗D_{ii}=\sum_{j}A_{ij}. The formulation of Eq. 1 relies on the assumption that connected nodes in the graph are likely to share the same label. This assumption, however, might restrict modeling capacity, as graph edges need not necessarily encode node similarity, but could contain additional information.
items.zh: 这里，ℒ0表示关于图中标记部分的监督损失，f(·)可以是类似神经网络的可微函数，λ是权重因子，X是节点特征向量Xi的矩阵。Δ = D - A表示无向图𝒢 = (𝒱, ℰ)的未归一化图拉普拉斯，其中N个节点vi ∈ 𝒱，边(vi, vj) ∈ ℰ，邻接矩阵A ∈ ℝ^{N×N}（二值或加权），度矩阵D_{ii} = ∑_j A_{ij}。公式1的公式依赖于图中相连节点可能共享相同标签的假设。然而，这一假设可能限制建模能力，因为图边不一定编码节点相似性，而可能包含额外信息。

items.en: In this work, we encode the graph structure directly using a neural network model f​(X,A)𝑓𝑋𝐴f(X,A) and train on a supervised target ℒ0subscriptℒ0\mathcal{L}_{0} for all nodes with labels, thereby avoiding explicit graph-based regularization in the loss function. Conditioning f​(⋅)𝑓⋅f(\cdot) on the adjacency matrix of the graph will allow the model to distribute gradient information from the supervised loss ℒ0subscriptℒ0\mathcal{L}_{0} and will enable it to learn representations of nodes both with and without labels.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们直接使用神经网络模型f(X, A)编码图结构，并在所有有标签的节点上训练监督目标ℒ0，从而避免损失函数中显式的基于图的正则化。将f(·)条件于图的邻接矩阵，将使模型能够从监督损失ℒ0分布梯度信息，并使其能够学习有标签和无标签节点的表示。

items.en: Our contributions are two-fold. Firstly, we introduce a simple and well-behaved layer-wise propagation rule for neural network models which operate directly on graphs and show how it can be motivated from a first-order approximation of spectral graph convolutions (Hammond et al., 2011). Secondly, we demonstrate how this form of a graph-based neural network model can be used for fast and scalable semi-supervised classification of nodes in a graph. Experiments on a number of datasets demonstrate that our model compares favorably both in classification accuracy and efficiency (measured in wall-clock time) against state-of-the-art methods for semi-supervised learning.
items.zh: 我们的贡献有两方面。首先，我们为直接在图上操作的神经网络模型引入了一种简单且表现良好的逐层传播规则，并展示了如何从谱图卷积的一阶近似中推导出它（Hammond等人，2011）。其次，我们展示了这种基于图的神经网络模型如何用于快速且可扩展的图中节点半监督分类。在多个数据集上的实验表明，我们的模型在分类准确率和效率（以挂钟时间衡量）方面均优于最先进的半监督学习方法。

items.en: In this section, we provide theoretical motivation for a specific graph-based neural network model f​(X,A)𝑓𝑋𝐴f(X,A) that we will use in the rest of this paper. We consider a multi-layer Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) with the following layer-wise propagation rule:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们为将在本文其余部分使用的特定基于图的神经网络模型f(X, A)提供理论动机。我们考虑一个多层图卷积网络（GCN），其逐层传播规则如下：

items.en: Here, A~=A+IN~𝐴𝐴subscript𝐼𝑁\tilde{A}=A+I_{N} is the adjacency matrix of the undirected graph 𝒢𝒢\mathcal{G} with added self-connections. INsubscript𝐼𝑁I_{N} is the identity matrix, D~i​i=∑jA~i​jsubscript~𝐷𝑖𝑖subscript𝑗subscript~𝐴𝑖𝑗\tilde{D}_{ii}=\sum_{j}\tilde{A}_{ij} and W(l)superscript𝑊𝑙W^{(l)} is a layer-specific trainable weight matrix. σ​(⋅)𝜎⋅\sigma(\cdot) denotes an activation function, such as the ReLU​(⋅)=max⁡(0,⋅)ReLU⋅0⋅\mathrm{ReLU}(\cdot)=\max(0,\cdot). H(l)∈ℝN×Dsuperscript𝐻𝑙superscriptℝ𝑁𝐷H^{(l)}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times D} is the matrix of activations in the lthsuperscript𝑙thl^{\text{th}} layer; H(0)=Xsuperscript𝐻0𝑋H^{(0)}=X. In the following, we show that the form of this propagation rule can be motivated111We provide an alternative interpretation of this propagation rule based on the Weisfeiler-Lehman algorithm (Weisfeiler & Lehmann, 1968) in Appendix A. via a first-order approximation of localized spectral filters on graphs (Hammond et al., 2011; Defferrard et al., 2016).
items.zh: 这里，Ã = A + I_N是添加了自连接的无向图𝒢的邻接矩阵。I_N是单位矩阵，D̃_{ii} = ∑_j Ã_{ij}，W^{(l)}是特定层的可训练权重矩阵。σ(·)表示激活函数，例如ReLU(·) = max(0, ·)。H^{(l)} ∈ ℝ^{N×D}是第l层的激活矩阵；H^{(0)} = X。下面，我们展示这种传播规则的形式可以通过局部谱滤波器在图上的局部一阶近似来推导（Hammond等人，2011；Defferrard等人，2016）。

items.en: We consider spectral convolutions on graphs defined as the multiplication of a signal x∈ℝN𝑥superscriptℝ𝑁x\in\mathbb{R}^{N} (a scalar for every node) with a filter gθ=diag​(θ)subscript𝑔𝜃diag𝜃g_{\theta}=\text{diag}(\theta) parameterized by θ∈ℝN𝜃superscriptℝ𝑁\theta\in\mathbb{R}^{N} in the Fourier domain, i.e.:
items.zh: 我们考虑图上的谱卷积，定义为信号x ∈ ℝ^N（每个节点一个标量）与参数化滤波器g_θ = diag(θ)（θ ∈ ℝ^N）在傅里叶域中的乘法，即：

items.en: where U𝑈U is the matrix of eigenvectors of the normalized graph Laplacian L=IN−D−12​A​D−12=U​Λ​U⊤𝐿subscript𝐼𝑁superscript𝐷12𝐴superscript𝐷12𝑈Λsuperscript𝑈topL=I_{N}-D^{-\frac{1}{2}}AD^{-\frac{1}{2}}=U\Lambda U^{\top}, with a diagonal matrix of its eigenvalues ΛΛ\Lambda and U⊤​xsuperscript𝑈top𝑥U^{\top}x being the graph Fourier transform of x𝑥x. We can understand gθsubscript𝑔𝜃g_{\theta} as a function of the eigenvalues of L𝐿L, i.e. gθ​(Λ)subscript𝑔𝜃Λg_{\theta}(\Lambda). Evaluating Eq. 3 is computationally expensive, as multiplication with the eigenvector matrix U𝑈U is 𝒪​(N2)𝒪superscript𝑁2\mathcal{O}(N^{2}). Furthermore, computing the eigendecomposition of L𝐿L in the first place might be prohibitively expensive for large graphs. To circumvent this problem, it was suggested in Hammond et al. (2011) that gθ​(Λ)subscript𝑔𝜃Λg_{\theta}(\Lambda) can be well-approximated by a truncated expansion in terms of Chebyshev polynomials Tk​(x)subscript𝑇𝑘𝑥T_{k}(x) up to Kthsuperscript𝐾thK^{\text{th}} order:
items.zh: 其中U是归一化图拉普拉斯L = I_N - D^{-1/2} A D^{-1/2} = U Λ U^⊤的特征向量矩阵，Λ是其对角特征值矩阵，U^⊤ x是x的图傅里叶变换。我们可以将g_θ理解为L的特征值的函数，即g_θ(Λ)。计算公式3计算成本高，因为与特征向量矩阵U相乘的复杂度为𝒪(N^2)。此外，首先计算L的特征分解对于大图可能过于昂贵。为了规避这个问题，Hammond等人（2011）建议g_θ(Λ)可以通过切比雪夫多项式T_k(x)的截断展开很好地近似，最高到K阶：

items.en: with a rescaled Λ~=2λmax​Λ−IN~Λ2subscript𝜆maxΛsubscript𝐼𝑁\tilde{\Lambda}=\frac{2}{\lambda_{\text{max}}}\Lambda-I_{N}. λmaxsubscript𝜆max\lambda_{\text{max}} denotes the largest eigenvalue of L𝐿L. θ′∈ℝKsuperscript𝜃′superscriptℝ𝐾\theta^{\prime}\in\mathbb{R}^{K} is now a vector of Chebyshev coefficients. The Chebyshev polynomials are recursively defined as Tk​(x)=2​x​Tk−1​(x)−Tk−2​(x)subscript𝑇𝑘𝑥2𝑥subscript𝑇𝑘1𝑥subscript𝑇𝑘2𝑥T_{k}(x)=2xT_{k-1}(x)-T_{k-2}(x), with T0​(x)=1subscript𝑇0𝑥1T_{0}(x)=1 and T1​(x)=xsubscript𝑇1𝑥𝑥T_{1}(x)=x. The reader is referred to Hammond et al. (2011) for an in-depth discussion of this approximation.
items.zh: 其中Λ̃ = (2/λ_max)Λ - I_N。λ_max表示L的最大特征值。θ' ∈ ℝ^K现在是切比雪夫系数向量。切比雪夫多项式递归定义为T_k(x) = 2x T_{k-1}(x) - T_{k-2}(x)，其中T_0(x) = 1，T_1(x) = x。关于此近似的深入讨论，请读者参考Hammond等人（2011）。

items.en: Going back to our definition of a convolution of a signal x𝑥x with a filter gθ′subscript𝑔superscript𝜃′g_{\theta^{\prime}}, we now have:
items.zh: 回到我们对信号x与滤波器g_θ'卷积的定义，我们现在有：

items.en: with L~=2λmax​L−IN~𝐿2subscript𝜆max𝐿subscript𝐼𝑁\tilde{L}=\frac{2}{\lambda_{\text{max}}}L-I_{N}; as can easily be verified by noticing that (U​Λ​U⊤)k=U​Λk​U⊤superscript𝑈Λsuperscript𝑈top𝑘𝑈superscriptΛ𝑘superscript𝑈top(U\Lambda U^{\top})^{k}=U\Lambda^{k}U^{\top}. Note that this expression is now K𝐾K-localized since it is a Kthsuperscript𝐾thK^{\text{th}}-order polynomial in the Laplacian, i.e. it depends only on nodes that are at maximum K𝐾K steps away from the central node (Kthsuperscript𝐾thK^{\text{th}}-order neighborhood). The complexity of evaluating Eq. 5 is 𝒪​(|ℰ|)𝒪ℰ\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{E}|), i.e. linear in the number of edges. Defferrard et al. (2016) use this K𝐾K-localized convolution to define a convolutional neural network on graphs.
items.zh: 其中L̃ = (2/λ_max)L - I_N；这很容易通过注意到(U Λ U^⊤)^k = U Λ^k U^⊤来验证。注意，这个表达式现在是K-局部的，因为它是拉普拉斯算子的K阶多项式，即它只依赖于距离中心节点最多K步的节点（K阶邻域）。计算公式5的复杂度为𝒪(|ℰ|)，即与边数成线性关系。Defferrard等人（2016）使用这种K-局部卷积来定义图上的卷积神经网络。

items.en: A neural network model based on graph convolutions can therefore be built by stacking multiple convolutional layers of the form of Eq. 5, each layer followed by a point-wise non-linearity. Now, imagine we limited the layer-wise convolution operation to K=1𝐾1K=1 (see Eq. 5), i.e. a function that is linear w.r.t. L𝐿L and therefore a linear function on the graph Laplacian spectrum.
items.zh: 因此，基于图卷积的神经网络模型可以通过堆叠多个形如公式5的卷积层来构建，每层之后接一个逐点非线性。现在，假设我们将逐层卷积操作限制为K=1（见公式5），即关于L的线性函数，因此是图拉普拉斯谱上的线性函数。

items.en: In this way, we can still recover a rich class of convolutional filter functions by stacking multiple such layers, but we are not limited to the explicit parameterization given by, e.g., the Chebyshev polynomials. We intuitively expect that such a model can alleviate the problem of overfitting on local neighborhood structures for graphs with very wide node degree distributions, such as social networks, citation networks, knowledge graphs and many other real-world graph datasets. Additionally, for a fixed computational budget, this layer-wise linear formulation allows us to build deeper models, a practice that is known to improve modeling capacity on a number of domains (He et al., 2016).
items.zh: 通过这种方式，我们仍然可以通过堆叠多个这样的层来恢复丰富的卷积滤波器函数类，但不受限于例如切比雪夫多项式的显式参数化。我们直观地期望，对于具有非常宽节点度分布的图，如社交网络、引文网络、知识图谱和许多其他真实世界图数据集，这种模型可以缓解对局部邻域结构过拟合的问题。此外，对于固定的计算预算，这种逐层线性公式允许我们构建更深的模型，这种做法已知能在多个领域提高建模能力（He等人，2016）。

items.en: In this linear formulation of a GCN we further approximate λmax≈2subscript𝜆max2\lambda_{\text{max}}\approx 2, as we can expect that neural network parameters will adapt to this change in scale during training. Under these approximations Eq. 5 simplifies to:
items.zh: 在这种GCN的线性公式中，我们进一步近似λ_max ≈ 2，因为我们可以预期神经网络参数会在训练过程中适应这种尺度变化。在这些近似下，公式5简化为：

items.en: with two free parameters θ0′superscriptsubscript𝜃0′\theta_{0}^{\prime} and θ1′superscriptsubscript𝜃1′\theta_{1}^{\prime}. The filter parameters can be shared over the whole graph. Successive application of filters of this form then effectively convolve the kthsuperscript𝑘thk^{\text{th}}-order neighborhood of a node, where k𝑘k is the number of successive filtering operations or convolutional layers in the neural network model.
items.zh: 具有两个自由参数θ_0'和θ_1'。滤波器参数可以在整个图上共享。这种形式的滤波器的连续应用实际上卷积了节点的k阶邻域，其中k是神经网络模型中连续滤波操作或卷积层的数量。

items.en: In practice, it can be beneficial to constrain the number of parameters further to address overfitting and to minimize the number of operations (such as matrix multiplications) per layer. This leaves us with the following expression:
items.zh: 在实践中，进一步约束参数数量以解决过拟合并最小化每层的操作（如矩阵乘法）数量可能是有益的。这给我们留下了以下表达式：

items.en: with a single parameter θ=θ0′=−θ1′𝜃superscriptsubscript𝜃0′superscriptsubscript𝜃1′\theta=\theta_{0}^{\prime}=-\theta_{1}^{\prime}. Note that IN+D−12​A​D−12subscript𝐼𝑁superscript𝐷12𝐴superscript𝐷12I_{N}+D^{-\frac{1}{2}}AD^{-\frac{1}{2}} now has eigenvalues in the range [0,2]02[0,2]. Repeated application of this operator can therefore lead to numerical instabilities and exploding/vanishing gradients when used in a deep neural network model. To alleviate this problem, we introduce the following renormalization trick: IN+D−12​A​D−12→D~−12​A~​D~−12→subscript𝐼𝑁superscript𝐷12𝐴superscript𝐷12superscript~𝐷12~𝐴superscript~𝐷12I_{N}+D^{-\frac{1}{2}}AD^{-\frac{1}{2}}\rightarrow\tilde{D}^{-\frac{1}{2}}\tilde{A}\tilde{D}^{-\frac{1}{2}}, with A~=A+IN~𝐴𝐴subscript𝐼𝑁\tilde{A}=A+I_{N} and D~i​i=∑jA~i​jsubscript~𝐷𝑖𝑖subscript𝑗subscript~𝐴𝑖𝑗\tilde{D}_{ii}=\sum_{j}\tilde{A}_{ij}.
items.zh: 具有单个参数θ = θ_0' = -θ_1'。注意，I_N + D^{-1/2} A D^{-1/2}现在的特征值在[0, 2]范围内。在深度神经网络模型中重复应用此算子可能导致数值不稳定和梯度爆炸/消失。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入以下重归一化技巧：I_N + D^{-1/2} A D^{-1/2} → D̃^{-1/2} Ã D̃^{-1/2}，其中Ã = A + I_N，D̃_{ii} = ∑_j Ã_{ij}。

items.en: We can generalize this definition to a signal X∈ℝN×C𝑋superscriptℝ𝑁𝐶X\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times C} with C𝐶C input channels (i.e. a C𝐶C-dimensional feature vector for every node) and F𝐹F filters or feature maps as follows:
items.zh: 我们可以将此定义推广到具有C个输入通道（即每个节点一个C维特征向量）的信号X ∈ ℝ^{N×C}和F个滤波器或特征图，如下所示：

items.en: where Θ∈ℝC×FΘsuperscriptℝ𝐶𝐹\Theta\in\mathbb{R}^{C\times F} is now a matrix of filter parameters and Z∈ℝN×F𝑍superscriptℝ𝑁𝐹Z\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times F} is the convolved signal matrix. This filtering operation has complexity 𝒪​(|ℰ|​F​C)𝒪ℰ𝐹𝐶\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{E}|FC), as A~​X~𝐴𝑋\tilde{A}X can be efficiently implemented as a product of a sparse matrix with a dense matrix.
items.zh: 其中Θ ∈ ℝ^{C×F}现在是滤波器参数矩阵，Z ∈ ℝ^{N×F}是卷积后的信号矩阵。此滤波操作的复杂度为𝒪(|ℰ| F C)，因为Ã X可以高效地实现为稀疏矩阵与稠密矩阵的乘积。

items.en: Having introduced a simple, yet flexible model f​(X,A)𝑓𝑋𝐴f(X,A) for efficient information propagation on graphs, we can return to the problem of semi-supervised node classification. As outlined in the introduction, we can relax certain assumptions typically made in graph-based semi-supervised learning by conditioning our model f​(X,A)𝑓𝑋𝐴f(X,A) both on the data X𝑋X and on the adjacency matrix A𝐴A of the underlying graph structure. We expect this setting to be especially powerful in scenarios where the adjacency matrix contains information not present in the data X𝑋X, such as citation links between documents in a citation network or relations in a knowledge graph. The overall model, a multi-layer GCN for semi-supervised learning, is schematically depicted in Figure 1.
items.zh: 在介绍了一个简单但灵活的图信息传播模型 f(X,A) 后，我们可以回到半监督节点分类问题。如引言所述，我们通过将模型 f(X,A) 同时基于数据 X 和底层图结构的邻接矩阵 A，放宽了基于图的半监督学习中通常做出的一些假设。我们预计这种设置将在邻接矩阵包含数据 X 中不存在的信息的场景中特别强大，例如引文网络中文献之间的引用链接或知识图谱中的关系。用于半监督学习的多层 GCN 整体模型示意性地描绘在图 1 中。

items.en: In the following, we consider a two-layer GCN for semi-supervised node classification on a graph with a symmetric adjacency matrix A𝐴A (binary or weighted). We first calculate A^=D~−12​A~​D~−12^𝐴superscript~𝐷12~𝐴superscript~𝐷12\hat{A}=\tilde{D}^{-\frac{1}{2}}\tilde{A}\tilde{D}^{-\frac{1}{2}} in a pre-processing step. Our forward model then takes the simple form:
items.zh: 在下文中，我们考虑一个两层 GCN，用于具有对称邻接矩阵 A（二值或加权）的图上的半监督节点分类。我们首先在预处理步骤中计算 A^ = D~^{-1/2} A~ D~^{-1/2}。然后我们的前向模型采用简单形式：

items.en: Here, W(0)∈ℝC×Hsuperscript𝑊0superscriptℝ𝐶𝐻W^{(0)}\in\mathbb{R}^{C\times H} is an input-to-hidden weight matrix for a hidden layer with H𝐻H feature maps. W(1)∈ℝH×Fsuperscript𝑊1superscriptℝ𝐻𝐹W^{(1)}\in\mathbb{R}^{H\times F} is a hidden-to-output weight matrix. The softmax activation function, defined as softmax​(xi)=1𝒵​exp⁡(xi)softmaxsubscript𝑥𝑖1𝒵subscript𝑥𝑖\mathrm{softmax}(x_{i})=\frac{1}{\mathcal{Z}}\exp(x_{i}) with 𝒵=∑iexp⁡(xi)𝒵subscript𝑖subscript𝑥𝑖\mathcal{Z}=\sum_{i}\exp(x_{i}), is applied row-wise. For semi-supervised multi-class classification, we then evaluate the cross-entropy error over all labeled examples:
items.zh: 这里，W^{(0)} ∈ R^{C×H} 是输入到隐藏层的权重矩阵，隐藏层有 H 个特征图。W^{(1)} ∈ R^{H×F} 是隐藏层到输出层的权重矩阵。Softmax 激活函数定义为 softmax(x_i) = (1/Z) exp(x_i)，其中 Z = ∑_i exp(x_i)，按行应用。对于半监督多类分类，我们计算所有标记样本上的交叉熵误差：

items.en: where 𝒴Lsubscript𝒴𝐿\mathcal{Y}_{L} is the set of node indices that have labels.
items.zh: 其中 Y_L 是有标签的节点索引集合。

items.en: The neural network weights W(0)superscript𝑊0W^{(0)} and W(1)superscript𝑊1W^{(1)} are trained using gradient descent. In this work, we perform batch gradient descent using the full dataset for every training iteration, which is a viable option as long as datasets fit in memory. Using a sparse representation for A𝐴A, memory requirement is 𝒪​(|ℰ|)𝒪ℰ\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{E}|), i.e. linear in the number of edges. Stochasticity in the training process is introduced via dropout (Srivastava et al., 2014). We leave memory-efficient extensions with mini-batch stochastic gradient descent for future work.
items.zh: 神经网络权重 W^{(0)} 和 W^{(1)} 使用梯度下降训练。在这项工作中，我们使用全数据集进行批量梯度下降，只要数据集适合内存，这是一个可行的选择。使用 A 的稀疏表示，内存需求为 O(|E|)，即与边数成线性关系。训练过程中的随机性通过 dropout 引入（Srivastava 等人，2014）。我们将具有小批量随机梯度下降的内存高效扩展留给未来工作。

items.en: In practice, we make use of TensorFlow (Abadi et al., 2015) for an efficient GPU-based implementation222Code to reproduce our experiments is available at https://github.com/tkipf/gcn. of Eq. 9 using sparse-dense matrix multiplications. The computational complexity of evaluating Eq. 9 is then 𝒪​(|ℰ|​C​H​F)𝒪ℰ𝐶𝐻𝐹\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{E}|CHF), i.e. linear in the number of graph edges.
items.zh: 在实践中，我们利用 TensorFlow（Abadi 等人，2015）进行高效的基于 GPU 的实现（复现实验的代码可在 https://github.com/tkipf/gcn 获取），使用稀疏-稠密矩阵乘法。评估公式 9 的计算复杂度为 O(|E| C H F)，即与图边数成线性关系。

items.en: Our model draws inspiration both from the field of graph-based semi-supervised learning and from recent work on neural networks that operate on graphs. In what follows, we provide a brief overview on related work in both fields.
items.zh: 我们的模型既从基于图的半监督学习领域，也从最近关于在图上的神经网络的工作中汲取灵感。接下来，我们简要概述这两个领域的相关工作。

items.en: A large number of approaches for semi-supervised learning using graph representations have been proposed in recent years, most of which fall into two broad categories: methods that use some form of explicit graph Laplacian regularization and graph embedding-based approaches. Prominent examples for graph Laplacian regularization include label propagation (Zhu et al., 2003), manifold regularization (Belkin et al., 2006) and deep semi-supervised embedding (Weston et al., 2012).
items.zh: 近年来，已经提出了大量使用图表示进行半监督学习的方法，其中大多数分为两大类：使用某种形式的显式图拉普拉斯正则化的方法和基于图嵌入的方法。图拉普拉斯正则化的突出例子包括标签传播（Zhu 等人，2003）、流形正则化（Belkin 等人，2006）和深度半监督嵌入（Weston 等人，2012）。

items.en: Recently, attention has shifted to models that learn graph embeddings with methods inspired by the skip-gram model (Mikolov et al., 2013). DeepWalk (Perozzi et al., 2014) learns embeddings via the prediction of the local neighborhood of nodes, sampled from random walks on the graph. LINE (Tang et al., 2015) and node2vec (Grover & Leskovec, 2016) extend DeepWalk with more sophisticated random walk or breadth-first search schemes. For all these methods, however, a multi-step pipeline including random walk generation and semi-supervised training is required where each step has to be optimized separately. Planetoid (Yang et al., 2016) alleviates this by injecting label information in the process of learning embeddings.
items.zh: 最近，注意力转向了通过受 skip-gram 模型（Mikolov 等人，2013）启发的方法学习图嵌入的模型。DeepWalk（Perozzi 等人，2014）通过预测节点的局部邻域（从图上的随机游走中采样）来学习嵌入。LINE（Tang 等人，2015）和 node2vec（Grover & Leskovec，2016）通过更复杂的随机游走或广度优先搜索方案扩展了 DeepWalk。然而，对于所有这些方法，都需要一个多步骤的流程，包括随机游走生成和半监督训练，其中每一步都必须单独优化。Planetoid（Yang 等人，2016）通过在嵌入学习过程中注入标签信息来缓解这一问题。

items.en: Neural networks that operate on graphs have previously been introduced in Gori et al. (2005); Scarselli et al. (2009) as a form of recurrent neural network. Their framework requires the repeated application of contraction maps as propagation functions until node representations reach a stable fixed point. This restriction was later alleviated in Li et al. (2016) by introducing modern practices for recurrent neural network training to the original graph neural network framework. Duvenaud et al. (2015) introduced a convolution-like propagation rule on graphs and methods for graph-level classification. Their approach requires to learn node degree-specific weight matrices which does not scale to large graphs with wide node degree distributions. Our model instead uses a single weight matrix per layer and deals with varying node degrees through an appropriate normalization of the adjacency matrix (see Section 3.1).
items.zh: 在图上的神经网络先前在 Gori 等人（2005）；Scarselli 等人（2009）中作为循环神经网络的一种形式被引入。他们的框架需要重复应用收缩映射作为传播函数，直到节点表示达到稳定的不动点。这一限制后来在 Li 等人（2016）中通过将循环神经网络训练的现代实践引入原始图神经网络框架而得到缓解。Duvenaud 等人（2015）引入了图上的类卷积传播规则和图级分类方法。他们的方法需要学习节点度特定的权重矩阵，这无法扩展到具有宽节点度分布的大图。我们的模型每层使用单个权重矩阵，并通过邻接矩阵的适当归一化来处理变化的节点度（见第 3.1 节）。

items.en: A related approach to node classification with a graph-based neural network was recently introduced in Atwood & Towsley (2016). They report 𝒪​(N2)𝒪superscript𝑁2\mathcal{O}(N^{2}) complexity, limiting the range of possible applications. In a different yet related model, Niepert et al. (2016) convert graphs locally into sequences that are fed into a conventional 1D convolutional neural network, which requires the definition of a node ordering in a pre-processing step.
items.zh: 一种使用基于图的神经网络进行节点分类的相关方法最近在 Atwood & Towsley（2016）中引入。他们报告了 O(N^2) 的复杂度，限制了可能的应用范围。在另一个不同但相关的模型中，Niepert 等人（2016）将图局部转换为序列，然后输入到传统的 1D 卷积神经网络中，这需要在预处理步骤中定义节点顺序。

items.en: Our method is based on spectral graph convolutional neural networks, introduced in Bruna et al. (2014) and later extended by Defferrard et al. (2016) with fast localized convolutions. In contrast to these works, we consider here the task of transductive node classification within networks of significantly larger scale. We show that in this setting, a number of simplifications (see Section 2.2) can be introduced to the original frameworks of Bruna et al. (2014) and Defferrard et al. (2016) that improve scalability and classification performance in large-scale networks.
items.zh: 我们的方法基于谱图卷积神经网络，由 Bruna 等人（2014）引入，后来由 Defferrard 等人（2016）通过快速局部卷积扩展。与这些工作相比，我们在此考虑在更大规模网络中的直推式节点分类任务。我们表明，在这种设置下，可以对 Bruna 等人（2014）和 Defferrard 等人（2016）的原始框架引入一些简化（见第 2.2 节），从而提高大规模网络中的可扩展性和分类性能。

items.en: We test our model in a number of experiments: semi-supervised document classification in citation networks, semi-supervised entity classification in a bipartite graph extracted from a knowledge graph, an evaluation of various graph propagation models and a run-time analysis on random graphs.
items.zh: 我们在多个实验中测试了我们的模型：引文网络中的半监督文档分类、从知识图谱中提取的二部图中的半监督实体分类、各种图传播模型的评估以及在随机图上的运行时间分析。

items.en: We closely follow the experimental setup in Yang et al. (2016). Dataset statistics are summarized in Table 1. In the citation network datasets—Citeseer, Cora and Pubmed (Sen et al., 2008)—nodes are documents and edges are citation links. Label rate denotes the number of labeled nodes that are used for training divided by the total number of nodes in each dataset. NELL (Carlson et al., 2010; Yang et al., 2016) is a bipartite graph dataset extracted from a knowledge graph with 55,864 relation nodes and 9,891 entity nodes.
items.zh: 我们严格遵循 Yang 等人（2016）的实验设置。数据集统计信息总结在表 1 中。在引文网络数据集——Citeseer、Cora 和 Pubmed（Sen 等人，2008）中，节点是文档，边是引用链接。标签率表示用于训练的标记节点数除以每个数据集中的总节点数。NELL（Carlson 等人，2010；Yang 等人，2016）是一个从知识图谱中提取的二部图数据集，包含 55,864 个关系节点和 9,891 个实体节点。

items.en: We consider three citation network datasets: Citeseer, Cora and Pubmed (Sen et al., 2008). The datasets contain sparse bag-of-words feature vectors for each document and a list of citation links between documents. We treat the citation links as (undirected) edges and construct a binary, symmetric adjacency matrix A𝐴A. Each document has a class label. For training, we only use 20 labels per class, but all feature vectors.
items.zh: 我们考虑三个引文网络数据集：Citeseer、Cora 和 Pubmed（Sen 等人，2008）。这些数据集包含每个文档的稀疏词袋特征向量和文档之间的引用链接列表。我们将引用链接视为（无向）边，并构造一个二值对称邻接矩阵 A。每个文档有一个类标签。对于训练，我们每类仅使用 20 个标签，但使用所有特征向量。

items.en: NELL is a dataset extracted from the knowledge graph introduced in (Carlson et al., 2010). A knowledge graph is a set of entities connected with directed, labeled edges (relations). We follow the pre-processing scheme as described in Yang et al. (2016). We assign separate relation nodes r1subscript𝑟1r_{1} and r2subscript𝑟2r_{2} for each entity pair (e1,r,e2)subscript𝑒1𝑟subscript𝑒2(e_{1},r,e_{2}) as (e1,r1)subscript𝑒1subscript𝑟1(e_{1},r_{1}) and (e2,r2)subscript𝑒2subscript𝑟2(e_{2},r_{2}). Entity nodes are described by sparse feature vectors. We extend the number of features in NELL by assigning a unique one-hot representation for every relation node, effectively resulting in a 61,278-dim sparse feature vector per node. The semi-supervised task here considers the extreme case of only a single labeled example per class in the training set. We construct a binary, symmetric adjacency matrix from this graph by setting entries Ai​j=1subscript𝐴𝑖𝑗1A_{ij}=1, if one or more edges are present between nodes i𝑖i and j𝑗j.
items.zh: NELL 是从（Carlson 等人，2010）中引入的知识图谱中提取的数据集。知识图谱是一组通过有向、带标签的边（关系）连接的实体。我们按照 Yang 等人（2016）中描述的预处理方案。我们为每个实体对 (e1, r, e2) 分配单独的关系节点 r1 和 r2，作为 (e1, r1) 和 (e2, r2)。实体节点由稀疏特征向量描述。我们通过为每个关系节点分配唯一的独热表示来扩展 NELL 中的特征数量，从而有效地为每个节点生成 61,278 维的稀疏特征向量。这里的半监督任务考虑了训练集中每类仅有一个标记样本的极端情况。我们通过设置 A_{ij}=1（如果节点 i 和 j 之间存在一条或多条边）来从该图构造一个二值对称邻接矩阵。

items.en: We simulate random graph datasets of various sizes for experiments where we measure training time per epoch. For a dataset with N𝑁N nodes we create a random graph assigning 2​N2𝑁2N edges uniformly at random. We take the identity matrix INsubscript𝐼𝑁I_{N} as input feature matrix X𝑋X, thereby implicitly taking a featureless approach where the model is only informed about the identity of each node, specified by a unique one-hot vector. We add dummy labels Yi=1subscript𝑌𝑖1Y_{i}=1 for every node.
items.zh: 我们模拟各种大小的随机图数据集，用于测量每个 epoch 的训练时间。对于具有 N 个节点的数据集，我们创建一个随机图，均匀随机分配 2N 条边。我们将单位矩阵 I_N 作为输入特征矩阵 X，从而隐式地采用无特征方法，其中模型仅被告知每个节点的身份，由唯一的独热向量指定。我们为每个节点添加虚拟标签 Y_i=1。

items.en: Unless otherwise noted, we train a two-layer GCN as described in Section 3.1 and evaluate prediction accuracy on a test set of 1,000 labeled examples. We provide additional experiments using deeper models with up to 10 layers in Appendix B. We choose the same dataset splits as in Yang et al. (2016) with an additional validation set of 500 labeled examples for hyperparameter optimization (dropout rate for all layers, L2 regularization factor for the first GCN layer and number of hidden units). We do not use the validation set labels for training.
items.zh: 除非另有说明，我们训练一个如第 3.1 节所述的两层 GCN，并在包含 1,000 个标记样本的测试集上评估预测准确率。我们在附录 B 中提供了使用多达 10 层的更深模型的额外实验。我们选择与 Yang 等人（2016）相同的数据集划分，并额外使用 500 个标记样本的验证集进行超参数优化（所有层的 dropout 率、第一 GCN 层的 L2 正则化因子和隐藏单元数量）。我们不使用验证集标签进行训练。

items.en: For the citation network datasets, we optimize hyperparameters on Cora only and use the same set of parameters for Citeseer and Pubmed. We train all models for a maximum of 200 epochs (training iterations) using Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2015) with a learning rate of 0.010.010.01 and early stopping with a window size of 101010, i.e. we stop training if the validation loss does not decrease for 10 consecutive epochs. We initialize weights using the initialization described in Glorot & Bengio (2010) and accordingly (row-)normalize input feature vectors. On the random graph datasets, we use a hidden layer size of 32 units and omit regularization (i.e. neither dropout nor L2 regularization).
items.zh: 对于引文网络数据集，我们仅在Cora上优化超参数，并对Citeseer和Pubmed使用相同的参数集。我们使用Adam（Kingma & Ba, 2015）训练所有模型，最多200个epoch（训练迭代），学习率为0.01，并采用早停法，窗口大小为10，即如果验证损失连续10个epoch没有下降，则停止训练。我们使用Glorot & Bengio (2010)中描述的初始化方法初始化权重，并相应地对输入特征向量进行（行）归一化。在随机图数据集上，我们使用32个单元的隐藏层大小，并省略正则化（即既无dropout也无L2正则化）。

items.en: We compare against the same baseline methods as in Yang et al. (2016), i.e. label propagation (LP) (Zhu et al., 2003), semi-supervised embedding (SemiEmb) (Weston et al., 2012), manifold regularization (ManiReg) (Belkin et al., 2006) and skip-gram based graph embeddings (DeepWalk) (Perozzi et al., 2014). We omit TSVM (Joachims, 1999), as it does not scale to the large number of classes in one of our datasets.
items.zh: 我们与Yang等人（2016）中相同的基线方法进行比较，即标签传播（LP）（Zhu等人，2003）、半监督嵌入（SemiEmb）（Weston等人，2012）、流形正则化（ManiReg）（Belkin等人，2006）和基于skip-gram的图嵌入（DeepWalk）（Perozzi等人，2014）。我们省略了TSVM（Joachims，1999），因为它无法扩展到我们一个数据集中大量的类别。

items.en: We further compare against the iterative classification algorithm (ICA) proposed in Lu & Getoor (2003) in conjunction with two logistic regression classifiers, one for local node features alone and one for relational classification using local features and an aggregation operator as described in Sen et al. (2008). We first train the local classifier using all labeled training set nodes and use it to bootstrap class labels of unlabeled nodes for relational classifier training. We run iterative classification (relational classifier) with a random node ordering for 10 iterations on all unlabeled nodes (bootstrapped using the local classifier). L2 regularization parameter and aggregation operator (count vs. prop, see Sen et al. (2008)) are chosen based on validation set performance for each dataset separately.
items.zh: 我们进一步与Lu & Getoor（2003）提出的迭代分类算法（ICA）进行比较，该算法结合了两个逻辑回归分类器：一个仅用于局部节点特征，另一个用于使用局部特征和聚合算子的关系分类，如Sen等人（2008）所述。我们首先使用所有带标签的训练集节点训练局部分类器，并用它为关系分类器训练引导出未标记节点的类别标签。我们对所有未标记节点（使用局部分类器引导）运行迭代分类（关系分类器），随机节点顺序，迭代10次。L2正则化参数和聚合算子（计数与比例，见Sen等人（2008））根据每个数据集的验证集性能分别选择。

items.en: Lastly, we compare against Planetoid (Yang et al., 2016), where we always choose their best-performing model variant (transductive vs. inductive) as a baseline.
items.zh: 最后，我们与Planetoid（Yang等人，2016）进行比较，我们总是选择其最佳性能的模型变体（直推式与归纳式）作为基线。

items.en: Results are summarized in Table 2. Reported numbers denote classification accuracy in percent. For ICA, we report the mean accuracy of 100 runs with random node orderings. Results for all other baseline methods are taken from the Planetoid paper (Yang et al., 2016). Planetoid* denotes the best model for the respective dataset out of the variants presented in their paper.
items.zh: 结果总结在表2中。报告的数字表示分类准确率（百分比）。对于ICA，我们报告了100次随机节点顺序运行的平均准确率。所有其他基线方法的结果取自Planetoid论文（Yang等人，2016）。Planetoid*表示其论文中针对相应数据集的最佳模型变体。

items.en: We further report wall-clock training time in seconds until convergence (in brackets) for our method (incl. evaluation of validation error) and for Planetoid. For the latter, we used an implementation provided by the authors333https://github.com/kimiyoung/planetoid and trained on the same hardware (with GPU) as our GCN model. We trained and tested our model on the same dataset splits as in Yang et al. (2016) and report mean accuracy of 100 runs with random weight initializations. We used the following sets of hyperparameters for Citeseer, Cora and Pubmed: 0.5 (dropout rate), 5⋅10−4⋅5superscript1045\cdot 10^{-4} (L2 regularization) and 161616 (number of hidden units); and for NELL: 0.1 (dropout rate), 1⋅10−5⋅1superscript1051\cdot 10^{-5} (L2 regularization) and 646464 (number of hidden units).
items.zh: 我们进一步报告了我们方法（包括验证误差评估）和Planetoid的挂钟训练时间（秒，直到收敛）（括号内）。对于后者，我们使用了作者提供的实现333https://github.com/kimiyoung/planetoid，并在与我们的GCN模型相同的硬件（带GPU）上进行训练。我们在与Yang等人（2016）相同的数据集划分上训练和测试我们的模型，并报告了100次随机权重初始化的平均准确率。我们对Citeseer、Cora和Pubmed使用以下超参数集：0.5（dropout率）、5⋅10⁻⁴（L2正则化）和16（隐藏单元数）；对于NELL：0.1（dropout率）、1⋅10⁻⁵（L2正则化）和64（隐藏单元数）。

items.en: In addition, we report performance of our model on 10 randomly drawn dataset splits of the same size as in Yang et al. (2016), denoted by GCN (rand. splits). Here, we report mean and standard error of prediction accuracy on the test set split in percent.
items.zh: 此外，我们报告了我们的模型在10个随机抽取的、与Yang等人（2016）相同大小的数据集划分上的性能，记为GCN（随机划分）。这里，我们报告测试集划分上预测准确率的均值和标准误差（百分比）。

items.en: We compare different variants of our proposed per-layer propagation model on the citation network datasets. We follow the experimental set-up described in the previous section. Results are summarized in Table 3. The propagation model of our original GCN model is denoted by renormalization trick (in bold). In all other cases, the propagation model of both neural network layers is replaced with the model specified under propagation model. Reported numbers denote mean classification accuracy for 100 repeated runs with random weight matrix initializations. In case of multiple variables ΘisubscriptΘ𝑖\Theta_{i} per layer, we impose L2 regularization on all weight matrices of the first layer.
items.zh: 我们在引文网络数据集上比较了我们提出的逐层传播模型的不同变体。我们遵循前一节中描述的实验设置。结果总结在表3中。我们原始GCN模型的传播模型记为重归一化技巧（粗体）。在所有其他情况下，两个神经网络层的传播模型都被替换为传播模型下指定的模型。报告的数字表示100次随机权重矩阵初始化的平均分类准确率。如果每层有多个变量Θᵢ，我们对第一层的所有权重矩阵施加L2正则化。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Wall-clock time per epoch for random graphs. (*) indicates out-of-memory error.
items.capZh: 图2：随机图的每epoch挂钟时间。（*）表示内存不足错误。

items.en: Here, we report results for the mean training time per epoch (forward pass, cross-entropy calculation, backward pass) for 100 epochs on simulated random graphs, measured in seconds wall-clock time. See Section 5.1 for a detailed description of the random graph dataset used in these experiments. We compare results on a GPU and on a CPU-only implementation444Hardware used: 16-core Intel R ○○\mathchar 525\relax Xeon R ○○\mathchar 525\relax CPU E5-2640 v3 @ 2.60GHz, GeForce R ○○\mathchar 525\relax GTX TITAN X in TensorFlow (Abadi et al., 2015). Figure 2 summarizes the results.
items.zh: 这里，我们报告在模拟随机图上100个epoch的平均每epoch训练时间（前向传播、交叉熵计算、反向传播），以秒为单位（挂钟时间）。关于这些实验中使用的随机图数据集的详细描述，请参见第5.1节。我们比较了在GPU和仅CPU实现上的结果444使用的硬件：16核Intel R ○○\mathchar 525\relax Xeon R ○○\mathchar 525\relax CPU E5-2640 v3 @ 2.60GHz, GeForce R ○○\mathchar 525\relax GTX TITAN X，使用TensorFlow（Abadi等人，2015）。图2总结了结果。

items.en: In the experiments demonstrated here, our method for semi-supervised node classification outperforms recent related methods by a significant margin. Methods based on graph-Laplacian regularization (Zhu et al., 2003; Belkin et al., 2006; Weston et al., 2012) are most likely limited due to their assumption that edges encode mere similarity of nodes. Skip-gram based methods on the other hand are limited by the fact that they are based on a multi-step pipeline which is difficult to optimize. Our proposed model can overcome both limitations, while still comparing favorably in terms of efficiency (measured in wall-clock time) to related methods. Propagation of feature information from neighboring nodes in every layer improves classification performance in comparison to methods like ICA (Lu & Getoor, 2003), where only label information is aggregated.
items.zh: 在展示的实验中，我们的半监督节点分类方法显著优于最近的相关方法。基于图拉普拉斯正则化的方法（Zhu等人，2003；Belkin等人，2006；Weston等人，2012）很可能受到其假设边仅编码节点相似性的限制。另一方面，基于skip-gram的方法受限于其基于难以优化的多步骤流水线。我们提出的模型可以克服这两个限制，同时在效率（以挂钟时间衡量）方面与相关方法相比仍然具有优势。与仅聚合标签信息的ICA（Lu & Getoor，2003）等方法相比，在每一层中从相邻节点传播特征信息提高了分类性能。

items.en: We have further demonstrated that the proposed renormalized propagation model (Eq. 8) offers both improved efficiency (fewer parameters and operations, such as multiplication or addition) and better predictive performance on a number of datasets compared to a naïve 1stsuperscript1st1^{\text{st}}-order model (Eq. 6) or higher-order graph convolutional models using Chebyshev polynomials (Eq. 5).
items.zh: 我们进一步证明了，与朴素的1阶模型（式6）或使用切比雪夫多项式的高阶图卷积模型（式5）相比，提出的重归一化传播模型（式8）在多个数据集上提供了更高的效率（更少的参数和操作，如乘法或加法）和更好的预测性能。

items.en: Here, we describe several limitations of our current model and outline how these might be overcome in future work.
items.zh: 在这里，我们描述了我们当前模型的几个局限性，并概述了如何在未来的工作中克服这些局限性。

items.en: In the current setup with full-batch gradient descent, memory requirement grows linearly in the size of the dataset. We have shown that for large graphs that do not fit in GPU memory, training on CPU can still be a viable option. Mini-batch stochastic gradient descent can alleviate this issue. The procedure of generating mini-batches, however, should take into account the number of layers in the GCN model, as the Kthsuperscript𝐾thK^{\text{th}}-order neighborhood for a GCN with K𝐾K layers has to be stored in memory for an exact procedure. For very large and densely connected graph datasets, further approximations might be necessary.
items.zh: 在当前的全批量梯度下降设置中，内存需求随数据集大小线性增长。我们已经证明，对于不适合GPU内存的大图，在CPU上训练仍然是一个可行的选择。小批量随机梯度下降可以缓解这个问题。然而，生成小批量的过程应考虑GCN模型中的层数，因为对于精确过程，具有K层的GCN的K阶邻域必须存储在内存中。对于非常大且密集连接的图数据集，可能需要进一步的近似。

items.en: Our framework currently does not naturally support edge features and is limited to undirected graphs (weighted or unweighted). Results on NELL however show that it is possible to handle both directed edges and edge features by representing the original directed graph as an undirected bipartite graph with additional nodes that represent edges in the original graph (see Section 5.1 for details).
items.zh: 我们的框架目前不自然支持边特征，并且仅限于无向图（加权或未加权）。然而，在NELL上的结果表明，通过将原始有向图表示为具有额外节点的无向二分图（这些节点代表原始图中的边），可以处理有向边和边特征（详见第5.1节）。

items.en: Through the approximations introduced in Section 2, we implicitly assume locality (dependence on the Kthsuperscript𝐾thK^{\text{th}}-order neighborhood for a GCN with K𝐾K layers) and equal importance of self-connections vs. edges to neighboring nodes. For some datasets, however, it might be beneficial to introduce a trade-off parameter λ𝜆\lambda in the definition of A~~𝐴\tilde{A}:
items.zh: 通过第2节中引入的近似，我们隐含地假设了局部性（对于具有K层的GCN，依赖于K阶邻域）以及自连接与到相邻节点的边具有同等重要性。然而，对于某些数据集，在Ã的定义中引入权衡参数λ可能是有益的：

items.en: This parameter now plays a similar role as the trade-off parameter between supervised and unsupervised loss in the typical semi-supervised setting (see Eq. 1). Here, however, it can be learned via gradient descent.
items.zh: 这个参数现在扮演着与典型半监督设置中监督和无监督损失之间的权衡参数类似的角色（见式1）。然而，在这里，它可以通过梯度下降学习。

items.en: We have introduced a novel approach for semi-supervised classification on graph-structured data. Our GCN model uses an efficient layer-wise propagation rule that is based on a first-order approximation of spectral convolutions on graphs. Experiments on a number of network datasets suggest that the proposed GCN model is capable of encoding both graph structure and node features in a way useful for semi-supervised classification. In this setting, our model outperforms several recently proposed methods by a significant margin, while being computationally efficient.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种用于图结构数据半监督分类的新方法。我们的GCN模型使用了一种高效的逐层传播规则，该规则基于谱图卷积的一阶近似。在多个网络数据集上的实验表明，所提出的GCN模型能够以对半监督分类有用的方式编码图结构和节点特征。在这种设置下，我们的模型显著优于几种最近提出的方法，同时计算效率高。

items.en: We would like to thank Christos Louizos, Taco Cohen, Joan Bruna, Zhilin Yang, Dave Herman, Pramod Sinha and Abdul-Saboor Sheikh for helpful discussions. This research was funded by SAP.
items.zh: 我们要感谢Christos Louizos、Taco Cohen、Joan Bruna、Zhilin Yang、Dave Herman、Pramod Sinha和Abdul-Saboor Sheikh的有益讨论。这项研究由SAP资助。
